title: OmenCore Model Capability Submission
description: One HP OMEN/Victus model's known capability profile, submitted by a community member for review before being merged into ModelCapabilityDatabase.cs. Field names and defaults mirror the ModelCapabilities C# class (src/OmenCoreApp/Hardware/ModelCapabilityDatabase.cs) exactly so a reviewer can convert an accepted submission into an AddModel(...) call with no semantic translation.

productId.description: HP Product ID / board ID, e.g. "8D87". Find it in Settings > Export Diagnostics, or via `wmic csproduct get name` / the BIOS SKU string. Must be exactly 4 hex characters, matching every existing database entry.

modelName.description: Human-readable model name, e.g. "OMEN MAX 16z-ak000 (AMD)". Prefer including the CPU vendor when a ProductId is shared across Intel/AMD SKUs.

modelNamePattern.description: Optional substring to match against the raw WMI model name string (Win32_ComputerSystem.Model) when the ProductId alone is ambiguous or unreliable for this board, e.g. "17-ck2". Only set this if you confirmed the exact WMI string via diagnostics export — do not guess.

family.description: Model family classification. See OmenModelFamily enum in DeviceCapabilities.cs. Use "Legacy" for pre-2021 boards, "OMEN2024Plus" for 2024+ boards with the newer WMI interface if unsure which specific family applies.

supportsFanControlWmi.description: WMI BIOS fan control (command 0x2D-family) works on this board.

supportsFanControlEc.description: Direct EC register fan control works on this board.

supportsFanCurves.description: Custom fan curves can be set and hold.

supportsIndependentFanCurves.description: CPU and GPU fans can run independent curves, not just a shared one.

supportsRpmReadback.description: Set this to false if the Guided Fan Diagnostic or General tab only ever shows an estimated RPM (look for "(fan-level estimate)" or a log line like "Fan RPM readback returned null") rather than a real tachometer reading.

maxFanLevel.description: Model-specific max WMI fan level override (0-100). Leave null unless you've confirmed the board caps out below the default.

minFanSpeedPercent.description: Set above 0 if the board never spins down to a true 0% / fan-off state — include the observed floor RPM/percent in notes.

allowDecoupledWmiThermalPolicyFallback.description: Advanced/rare: only set true if you've confirmed this board needs the WMI thermal/performance policy write to hold OEM performance behavior when direct EC/MSR power-limit writes are unavailable. Leave the default unless a maintainer asked you to set this.

supportsUndervolt.description: Set false for AMD CPUs — Intel-style MSR undervolting doesn't apply.

tdpOverridesWatts.description: Only include fields here if you have measured, board-specific values that differ from OmenCore's global defaults — leave the whole object out otherwise.

notes.description: Quirks, limitations, or caveats a maintainer/future user should know — e.g. "BIOS locks GPU TGP below 140W regardless of OmenCore setting" or "Always-on fan option in BIOS must be disabled for 0% to reach fan-off."

reportedBy.description: Your Discord/GitHub handle, so a maintainer can follow up with questions.

sourceDiagnosticsExport.description: Confirms the values above were read from an actual OmenCore diagnostics export (Settings > Export Diagnostics) or Guided Fan Diagnostic run on the real device, not guessed or copied from a similar model. Submissions without this will be rejected — see CONTRIBUTING_MODEL_DATABASE.md.
